findings.observation: A full-screen email-capture popup ('Subscribe to get a reward now / REVEAL REWARD') overlays the hero on load across homepage and PDPs, blocking the first impression and the product.
Collection grids list teas by name with no benefit-led navigation (sleep / digestion / immunity), so shoppers must decode products instead of shopping their goal.
Teas and accessories (mug, infuser, tea bags) are sold separately; no 'ritual kit' bundles tea with brewing accessories.
PDP has no 'complete your ritual' cross-sell or sampler suggestion near the buy box.
Consumable tea PDP offers a one-time add-to-cart only; no subscribe-and-save / refill option for a repeat-consumption product.
The Ambassador Program (a referral/loyalty asset) is buried in the footer and never surfaced at purchase or post-purchase moments.
Functional benefits (sleep, heartburn, immunity) live in product copy and blog but have no dedicated intent landing pages to capture search demand.
Strong founder/family story content (Jesse Rojas) is not connected to product modules or a brand-story shopping path.
Pages fire 200+ requests with ~20 console errors (failed shop.app third-party scripts); the best-sellers collection took ~10s to load in capture.
